ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the survey was conducted */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the survey belongs to */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was conducted */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment used for the survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "survey_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the survey */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator leading the survey */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the survey */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the survey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the survey (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "east" REAL /* East coordinate of the location */,
  "north" REAL /* North coordinate of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the location is situated */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional details about the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was last calibrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the equipment (e.g., operational, maintenance, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey line */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey the line belongs to */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Number of the line */,
  "line_type" TEXT /* Type of the line */,
  "start_point" TEXT /* Start point of the survey line (e.g., coordinates) */,
  "end_point" TEXT /* End point of the survey line (e.g., coordinates) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the survey line */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the survey line (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_lines_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey line the reading belongs to */,
  "location" REAL /* Location of the reading */,
  "rl" REAL /* RL value of the reading */,
  "east" REAL /* East coordinate of the reading */,
  "north" REAL /* North coordinate of the reading */,
  "resistivity" REAL /* Resistivity value of the reading */,
  "conductivity" REAL /* Conductivity value of the reading */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth at which the reading was taken */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the reading location */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the reading location */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the reading was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_readings_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES survey_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resistivity_readings" (
  "resistivity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resistivity reading */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reading the resistivity reading belongs to */,
  "resistivity" REAL /* Resistivity value of the reading */,
  "log_resistivity" REAL /* Logarithm of the resistivity value */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth at which the resistivity reading was taken */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the resistivity reading location */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the resistivity reading location */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the resistivity reading was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resistivity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resistivity_readings_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES survey_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conductivity_readings" (
  "conductivity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conductivity reading */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reading the conductivity reading belongs to */,
  "conductivity" REAL /* Conductivity value of the reading */,
  "log_conductivity" REAL /* Logarithm of the conductivity value */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth at which the conductivity reading was taken */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the conductivity reading location */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the conductivity reading location */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the conductivity reading was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conductivity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conductivity_readings_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES survey_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the survey */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the report */,
  "reviewer" TEXT /* Reviewer of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, reviewed, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_reports_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_manuals" (
  "manual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manual */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment the manual belongs to */,
  "manual_date" TEXT /* Date the manual was created */,
  "manual_file" TEXT /* File path to the manual file */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the manual */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the manual (e.g., current, outdated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_manuals_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the survey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the survey version (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_versions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reading_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reading the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the reading */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reading version (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reading_versions_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES survey_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resistivity_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "resistivity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resistivity reading the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the resistivity reading */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the resistivity reading version (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resistivity_versions_resistivity_id FOREIGN KEY ("resistivity_id") REFERENCES resistivity_readings ("resistivity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conductivity_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "conductivity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conductivity reading the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the conductivity reading */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the conductivity reading version (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conductivity_versions_conductivity_id FOREIGN KEY ("conductivity_id") REFERENCES conductivity_readings ("conductivity_id")
)
